action.reasoning: Observation: Only 0.0193h remain (≈1 min). The best model (iter 10) achieved 0.41% success rate; iter 11 dropped to 0%. All PPO and DQN variants with frame stacking, intrinsic bonuses, and flat observations failed to learn. Analysis: Minigrid tasks with sparse rewards and partial observability require more sophisticated exploration, reward shaping, or demonstration data that we didn't have time to implement. Decision: End experiment now; no time for further training.
action.done_reason: Time budget exhausted (≈1 min left). Best success rate is 0.0041, far below useful threshold. No further training possible.
